◆ Strategic Proposal — UK & Europe · 2026

ORN Connect
A Destination Management Company

One entity. One brand. ORN Connect is the UK and European Destination Management Company for the ORN Global Group — the central commercial contracting authority, the inbound reservations and fulfilment operation, and the operating transport vehicle (previously Skyjet), all unified under a single brand powered by Nexus as the platform and serving TripFactory, and all global group offices as primary clients.

One EntityORN Connect — DMC, contracting, reservations, transport
Operating FleetPreviously Skyjet — now ORN Connect fleet (96+ vehicles)
PlatformNexus — reservations, product, fulfilment
Global ClientsTripFactory, AU/NZ, USA, Middle East — all group offices
FocusInbound Europe — all markets selling to UK & Europe
FundingReallocated group budgets — no new external spend
The Model

One brand. Everything connected.

ORN Connect replaces ORN Holidays, Skyjet (as external brand), and the former Nexus UK concept under a single, unified Destination Management Company. The Nexus platform powers the reservations and product infrastructure. TripFactory and all global group offices are the paying clients — booking inbound UK and European product through ORN Connect.

ORN Connect

The single brand. Commercial contracting authority, DMC entity, reservations operation, and transport provider — all unified. Previously operating as ORN Holidays (commercial) + Skyjet (transport). Now one company, one name, one P&L.

Previously: ORN Holidays + Skyjet

Nexus Platform

The technology and reservations platform that powers ORN Connect's booking operations. Nexus handles all reservation flows, product availability, agent portal access, and group fulfilment — consistent with how Nexus AU operates for the Australian market.

Platform · Reservations · Agent portal

Global Client Network

TripFactory (B2C), all group offices — AU/NZ, USA, Middle East, India — and inbound trade agents worldwide are the clients of ORN Connect. They sell outbound from their locations to UK & Europe inbound product. ORN Connect handles everything from contracting to delivery.

TripFactory · AU · USA · ME · Trade agents
The shift: Rather than fragmented entities (ORN Holidays contracting, Skyjet operating, a separate res team), ORN Connect is a single Destination Management Company — one contract, one point of contact, one brand for every global office, trade agent, and consumer booking UK and European travel.

ORN Connect

The UK & European Destination Management Company

ORN Connect is the group's sole commercial contracting, reservations, fulfilment, and transport entity for UK and Europe. It replaces and unifies what was previously ORN Holidays (contracting), Skyjet (transport operations), and the proposed Nexus UK reservations function under one brand, one P&L, and one leadership team. Based at 17 Hanover Square, London.

Central Contracting Authority

ORN Connect holds all hotel, ground, experience, and attraction contracts for UK and Europe. No group office contracts independently. All rates are set, maintained, and distributed by ORN Connect. Ken Newton manages the European hotel portfolio (27+ properties). Manish Suchde manages global DMC and supplier relationships.

Ken Newton · Manish Suchde

Inbound DMC — All Markets

Operates as the official UK and European DMC for all inbound channels — TripFactory B2C, all group offices selling outbound to Europe, inbound trade agents, and direct inbound enquiries. FIT, GIT, MICE, escorted touring, and cruise all handled by ORN Connect.

Inbound FIT · GIT · MICE · Cruise · Escorted

Transport Operations (previously Skyjet)

ORN Connect operates the full vehicle fleet — 96+ vehicles including 30+ touring coaches and 65+ Mercedes-Benz private transfer vehicles, all now operating under the ORN Connect brand. ISO 27001 certified. Adonis Iliopoulos leads the transport operation. All departures and transfers operate to the ORN Connect commercial brief.

Previously Skyjet · 96+ vehicles · ISO 27001

Reservations via Nexus Platform

All booking reservations, agent enquiries, group fulfilment, and pre-departure documentation are handled through the Nexus platform — the same platform used by Nexus AU. Dedicated ORN Connect reservations agents manage all inbound booking flows from the Nexus UK hub at 17 Hanover Square.

Nexus platform · Res agents · Agent portal

Global Cruise Management

ORN Connect manages and distributes cruise product globally — the ORN Cruise programme, contracting cruise lines, managing allotments, distributing to TAG and TripFactory. All cruise bookings processed by the ORN Connect reservations team at 17 Hanover Square.

ORN Cruise · Global allotments

Outbound UK & Europe (Phase 4)

Once the inbound operation is profitable — from Month 18 — ORN Connect extends to operate outbound holidays originating from the UK and Europe, using its contracted supplier base, the Nexus platform, and its existing transport fleet.

Phase 4 · Not initial scope
Transport — Previously Skyjet

ORN Connect Transport Division

The Skyjet fleet and operations are now the ORN Connect Transport Division. The vehicles, licences, and team remain the same — the brand transitions to ORN Connect. Adonis Iliopoulos continues to lead transport operations, reporting to Ajay Kawa.

96+
Total vehicle fleet
30+
Touring coaches
65+
Private transfer vehicles
ISO
27001 certified

Escorted & Series Tour Operations

ORN Connect operates UK and European escorted tour departures — Scottish Highlands, England & Wales, and European circuits. Series departures managed centrally, sold via TripFactory and all group offices. Manifests and passenger lists managed by the Nexus reservations team.

Escorted tours · Series departures · UK & Europe

Airport Transfers & Ground Transport

65+ Mercedes-Benz private transfer vehicles operating airport-to-hotel and hotel-to-attraction transfers across UK and Europe. All transfer bookings processed through the Nexus platform. Pricing set centrally by the ORN Connect commercial team.

65+ vehicles · Transfers · UK & Europe

Group & MICE Transport

Dedicated coaching for GIT groups, MICE movements, and incentive travel — all booked through ORN Connect's commercial team and processed via Nexus. Coach allocation and route planning managed by the transport ops team with manifests from the res team.

GIT · MICE · Incentive groups

Brand Transition

All Skyjet-branded vehicles, documentation, and communications transition to ORN Connect. Where relevant — particularly in trade and B2B contexts where Skyjet is known — communications can reference "ORN Connect (previously Skyjet)" during the transition period.

Previously Skyjet · Transition period
ORN Connect DMC

Reservations & Fulfilment — Powered by Nexus

The ORN Connect reservations operation is powered by the Nexus platform — the same platform used by Nexus AU for the Australian and ANZ market. ORN Connect's dedicated reservations team handles all inbound booking enquiries, group fulfilment, and pre-departure management from 17 Hanover Square.

Nexus Platform

Nexus is the reservations, product, and agent interface platform. All booking enquiries, rate access, availability checks, and group quotes are handled through Nexus. The same system used by Nexus AU — giving overseas offices and agents a familiar interface.

Nexus · Consistent with AU

Inbound Trade Agents

UK-based inbound trade agents, overseas booking agents, and OTAs book UK and European product through ORN Connect via the Nexus agent portal. ORN Connect manages all agent relationships, briefings, and commercial terms.

Trade agents · OTAs · Agent portal

Group Fulfilment

All group bookings — rooming lists, passenger manifests, pre-departure documentation, and T-7 QC gate handoff (Clinton Thomas) — managed by the ORN Connect reservations team. Pre-departure packs issued to agents and passengers.

GIT · Groups · QC gate · Clinton Thomas

Revenue Model

Five income streams — all captured by ORN Connect

As a single entity, all revenue flows to ORN Connect. No more split between multiple companies. Income from contracting, operations, reservations, and management fees all sit on one P&L — making reporting cleaner and accountability clearer.

Transaction Fee
Per booking

Group office transaction fee

Applied to every booking by a group office using ORN Connect contracted rates — hotels, transfers, tours, cruise. Volume-linked — scales automatically with group growth.

% Revenue Share
% of GTV

Operated departure participation

Percentage of gross travel value on every escorted tour departure and transfer operated by ORN Connect (previously Skyjet operations). One company — one P&L line.

Inbound Commission
Net margin

Nexus platform inbound bookings

Net rate margin on all inbound bookings handled by ORN Connect's Nexus reservations team — FIT, GIT, groups, transfers, cruise.

Management Fee
Per office

Global client office retainer

Each group office (USA, AU/NZ, Middle East) pays a periodic management fee for access to ORN Connect centrally contracted rates, the Nexus product hub, and API infrastructure.

Budget Reallocation
Consolidated

European office budget consolidation

European office budgets currently funding duplicate contracting (previously ORN Holidays), transport (previously Skyjet), and reservations functions are consolidated into a single ORN Connect UK budget. No new net external funding required at launch.

1
Entity · One P&L
5
Income streams
5+
Global client offices
£0
New external funding
Cost Model

One entity — no duplication

Consolidating ORN Holidays, Skyjet, and the reservations function under a single ORN Connect brand eliminates structural duplication. The model is funded entirely from reallocated existing budgets — no new spend required to launch.

Previous StructureOld StateORN Connect ModelImpact
ORN Holidays (contracting)Separate commercial entity with own contracting team — fragmented from operationsORN Connect is the single commercial and contracting authority — contracting team stays, brand unifiesSIMPLIFY
Skyjet (transport operations)Separate operational brand — fleet and licences separate from DMC brandORN Connect Transport Division. Same fleet, same team, same licences — new brand. "Previously Skyjet" in transition commsREBRAND
Separate reservations functionNo dedicated UK inbound res team — bookings handled ad hoc across officesORN Connect Nexus reservations team at 17 Hanover Square — Head of Res + agents, Nexus platformESTABLISH
Duplicated EU office contractingEach EU office sourcing its own product — duplicated cost, no central authorityORN Connect holds all EU contracts — all offices access via Nexus product hub. One annual negotiationSAVE
Fragmented group tour opsNo central departure programme or seat management across the groupORN Connect series departures — Nexus manages seat inventory, transport ops managed centrallyPOOL
Disconnected tech stackMultiple tools across offices — no single source of product, bookings, or availabilityNexus platform + Zoho CRM — single source of truth for all ORN Connect product and bookingsCENTRALISE
Net position: Consolidating ORN Holidays contracting headcount and Skyjet operational overhead under a single ORN Connect P&L — combined with European office budget reallocation — funds the Nexus reservations team (Head of Reservations + 2 agents) at no new net cost. From Month 4, ORN Connect inbound commission income exceeds the reservations team cost.
Transaction Flow

End to end — one brand throughout

Because ORN Connect is a single entity, every step in the booking journey carries the same brand. No handoffs between separate companies — just one team, one system (Nexus), one operator.

Flow A — Inbound trade agent booking
1

Agent enquiry

Trade agent contacts ORN Connect via Nexus agent portal, email, or phone

2

Quote via Nexus

ORN Connect res team prices using centrally contracted rates on Nexus platform

3

Confirmed

Booking confirmed through Nexus. Inbound commission margin captured on ORN Connect P&L

4

Transport allocated

ORN Connect transport team allocates coach / transfer from own fleet. Manifest from Nexus

5

Operate & earn

ORN Connect operates. All margin — contracting, operations, handling — on one P&L

Flow B — TripFactory / group office selling Europe inbound
1

Office sells

TripFactory or AU/USA/ME office sells UK & Europe inbound via their channel

2

Nexus request

Booking request hits ORN Connect via Nexus — rates, availability, group configuration

3

Transaction fee

ORN Connect applies transaction fee to the group office for using centrally contracted rates

4

ORN Connect operates

Coaches, hotels, guides — all confirmed and operated by ORN Connect. QC gate with Clinton Thomas

5

Income captured

Transaction fee + operated departure % — both on ORN Connect P&L. Single entity reporting

Implementation Roadmap

Four phases — one entity from day one

Unlike the previous three-entity model, ORN Connect launches as a single brand from Phase 1. The Nexus reservations team, the transport division (previously Skyjet), and the contracting function all operate under one name from the start.

Phase 1 — Launch ORN Connect

Months 1–3: Brand, team, structure

  • Formally establish ORN Connect as the single UK & European DMC entity
  • Transition Skyjet brand to ORN Connect Transport Division ("previously Skyjet" in comms)
  • Appoint Head of Reservations — first hire for ORN Connect Nexus team
  • Configure Nexus platform for ORN Connect UK reservations operation
  • Notify all group offices: TripFactory, AU, USA, Middle East — single point of contact is now ORN Connect
  • Confirm Incoming Europe partnership scope with Eileen Corrales
  • Consolidate all EU office contracting budgets into ORN Connect UK P&L
Phase 2 — Inbound Open

Months 3–9: Nexus live, tours operating

  • ORN Connect Nexus reservations open — agent portal live, trade outreach begins
  • ORN Connect Transport Division first series departures — UK & European escorted tours
  • ORN Cruise inbound product on-sale — all bookings via ORN Connect Nexus team
  • Hire Senior Res Agent and Res Agent (Nexus team — 3 people minimum)
  • Transaction fee invoicing live with all group offices
  • Global product hub live — all offices accessing ORN Connect contracted rates
Phase 3 — Scale

Months 9–18: Build on inbound

  • Zoho CRM live — full ORN Connect pipeline, booking conversion, revenue reporting
  • Expand Nexus reservations team — target 4–6 agents by Month 9
  • Quarterly group income reporting — transaction fees, inbound commission, departure %
  • Expand ORN Connect tour programme — additional UK and European itineraries
  • Fleet capacity review — ORN Connect Transport Division planning for Year 2
  • Cost audit vs pre-consolidation (ORN Holidays + Skyjet) baseline
Phase 4 — Outbound

Months 18+: UK & European outbound

  • Extend ORN Connect to operate outbound FIT and GIT from UK and Europe
  • Nexus platform extended for outbound fulfilment
  • TripFactory B2C primary outbound distribution channel for UK-originated product
  • MICE programme launched as managed group service
  • Long-haul partnerships (Macau, Cathay Pacific) integrated into ORN Connect product
Global Client Network & Partners

TripFactory and the group — ORN Connect's primary clients

TripFactory and all ORN global offices are the primary clients of ORN Connect — selling outbound from their locations to UK and European inbound product supplied, operated, and fulfilled by ORN Connect. Every booking through these channels generates income for ORN Connect.

TripFactory — B2C Primary Client

TripFactory is ORN Connect's primary B2C distribution channel. ORN Connect series departures, inbound FIT products, and cruise are listed on TripFactory for direct consumer purchase. In Phase 4, TripFactory becomes the primary outbound distribution channel for UK-originated product.

B2C · Primary client · Phase 4 outbound

AU / NZ Office — Sahil Nijhawan

The ANZ office sells outbound to Europe via ORN Connect. All UK and European product purchased through ORN Connect contracted rates via the Nexus platform. Transaction fee applies per booking. Yukti Kumar coordinates ANZ product requirements with ORN Connect.

Sahil Nijhawan · Yukti Kumar · Nexus AU link

USA Office — Kirk Demeter / Kerryn Collins

USA office sells UK and European inbound product to the North American market. All bookings via ORN Connect Nexus platform. TAG B2B agent network managed by Kerryn Collins routes bookings directly through ORN Connect.

Kirk Demeter · Kerryn Collins · TAG network

Middle East — Baris Intepe (Gateway)

Turkey, Eastern Mediterranean, and Middle East inbound groups processed via ORN Connect. Baris Intepe manages the ME gateway ahead of ME CEO appointment. All ME market UK and European product via ORN Connect Nexus platform.

Baris Intepe · Turkey · ME · Inbound

Incoming Europe — Eileen Corrales

Primary European ground partner. 27+ hotel properties across Scotland, England, and Wales. Provides in-country ground services for all ORN Connect touring departures. ORN Connect is the commercial authority; Incoming Europe delivers ground execution.

Eileen Corrales · 27+ properties · Ken Newton

ORN Cruise — via ORN Connect

ORN Cruise product (transitioning from Skyjet) distributed globally through ORN Connect. All cruise allotments contracted centrally. All cruise bookings via ORN Connect Nexus reservations team. Global distribution to TAG, TripFactory, and all group offices.

ORN Cruise · Global distribution · Nexus
Operating Principles

Seven rules for one entity

I

One brand, one authority

ORN Connect is the only contracting, operating, and reservations authority for UK and European product. No group office contracts independently. No parallel operations under legacy brand names.

II

Nexus is the platform

All reservations, product distribution, agent access, and group fulfilment flow through the Nexus platform. Manual processes outside Nexus are a transition state only — not a target.

III

TripFactory and global offices are the clients

ORN Connect serves the group. TripFactory B2C, AU/NZ, USA, and Middle East all purchase UK and European inbound product through ORN Connect. Every booking generates transaction fee income.

IV

Inbound before outbound

The inbound UK and European operation must be profitable and fully staffed before outbound scope is added. Phase 4 only opens when Phase 3 metrics are met.

V

One P&L — full visibility

Unifying ORN Holidays and Skyjet income under ORN Connect creates one P&L. Contracting margin, transport operations income, reservations commission, and management fees all visible in one report.

VI

No new funding at launch

ORN Connect is capitalised from reallocated ORN Holidays and Skyjet budgets. The Nexus reservations team is self-funding from inbound commission by Month 4.

VII

Skyjet transition is managed

Where Skyjet is known in the trade — B2B operators, coach contacts, supplier agreements — communications reference "ORN Connect (previously Skyjet)" during the transition period. Full brand migration by end of Phase 2.

ORN Connect Team

One team. One entity.

All roles sit under ORN Connect. No separate company structures. Commercial, transport (previously Skyjet), and reservations (Nexus-powered) all report through the same leadership line to Ajay Kawa as CEO UK & Europe.

One team, one entity: ORN Connect brings together what was previously ORN Holidays (commercial), Skyjet (transport), and the proposed reservations function under a single leadership structure. No separate company meetings, no separate reporting lines — one P&L, one CEO.

Connecting the World to Europe

One brand. Every destination. Every office. Every traveller.

Brand Vision

ORN Connect — what the brand stands for

ORN Connect is the connective tissue of the ORN Global Group. It connects every global office selling outbound travel to Europe — to the product, the transport, the hotels, and the experiences that make a holiday. It connects trade agents to live inventory. It connects passengers to the UK and European destinations they dream about. And it connects the group's commercial ambition to a single, scalable, expertly-run DMC operation.

"ORN Connect is where every journey to Europe begins — for our clients, our agents, and our passengers."

Ajay Kawa · CEO UK & Europe

The ORN Connect Experience
Why ORN Connect connects everything

Global group · Single DMC

Every group office — 5+ regions — has one contact for all European product. ORN Connect is that contact. One relationship, one contract, one rate library.

Nexus gives agents confidence

Trade agents worldwide access ORN Connect product through the Nexus platform — live availability, instant quote, familiar interface. The same system Nexus AU operates.

Transport already in-house

The 96+ vehicle fleet (previously Skyjet) means ORN Connect controls the full delivery chain — hotel, ground, coach, transfer — without third-party transport dependency.

Your Gateway
to Europe

DESTINATION MANAGEMENT 17 HANOVER SQUARE · LONDON
About ORN Connect

The UK & European DMC for the ORN Global Group

ORN Connect is a Destination Management Company headquartered at 17 Hanover Square, London. We are the UK and European inbound operation for the ORN Global Group — managing all contracting, reservations, touring, transfers, and cruise product for our global offices and trade agent partners. Powered by the Nexus platform, our dedicated reservations team handles everything from first enquiry to on-ground delivery.

Everything your clients need across the UK & Europe

Escorted Touring

Series departures across UK and Europe — Scottish Highlands, England & Wales, European circuits. 30+ touring coaches. All operated by ORN Connect.

👥

Groups & MICE
